entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Grain sorghum (Sorghum bicolor) used for production worldwide

entities.name: GRAIN MOLD
entities.description: A biotic constraint affecting sorghum production

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A biotic constraint affecting sorghum production

entities.name: GRAIN MOLD RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum to resist grain mold infection

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum to resist downy mildew infection

entities.name: SORGHUM MINI-CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A collection of 242 germplasm accessions derived from a larger core collection

entities.name: SANDWICH INOCULATION TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A greenhouse-based method used to screen for downy mildew resistance

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: Environmental period during which certain accessions flowered and were screened

entities.name: PHOTOPERIOD SENSITIVITY
entities.description: The response of the plant to the length of day/night, affecting flowering time

entities.name: FIELD EPIPHYTOTIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: Natural disease outbreak conditions in the field used for screening

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics related to the production and management of the crop

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Physical characteristics and structure of the plant

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE BREEDING
entities.description: Programs focused on developing crop varieties resistant to diseases
